name: Code Review Workflow
description: Comprehensive code review with adversarial critique and security assessment. Three-stage review process for maximum quality.

steps.description: Review for best practices, readability, and maintainability
steps.exit_criteria: All code reviewed with constructive feedback

steps.description: Find edge cases, potential bugs, and architectural issues
steps.exit_criteria: At least 3 issues found or code confirmed exceptional

steps.description: Security vulnerability check (OWASP Top 10, injection, XSS, etc.)

success_criteria: Code approved or actionable feedback provided with no critical security issues
